hero.headline: Practical parts. Reliably delivered.
hero.subtext: We design and 3D print replacement parts, repair components, and functional prototypes built for real-world use.

projects.label: Examples
projects.heading: Solutions that make life easier.
projects.subtext: From broken household components to practical one-off builds, we create parts that fit, function, and last.

items.title: Cabinet hinge repair
items.description: Broken hinge mount replaced with a stronger, better-fitting printed part.

items.title: Toaster knob replacement
items.description: Missing control knob recreated for secure fit and everyday use.

items.title: Custom drawer pull
items.description: Functional pull designed and printed when the original hardware was unavailable.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.heading: Send it
steps.text: Share photos, measurements, or the broken part itself so we can assess fit and function.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.heading: We design
steps.text: We model your part for real-world performance, then confirm pricing and timeline.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.heading: We make it
steps.text: We print, test, and finish your part, ready for pickup, local delivery, or shipping.

cta_section.heading: Built for the part nobody sells anymore.
cta_section.text: Whether you need one replacement or a small run, we focus on practical outcomes: clean fit, reliable function, and honest guidance.

quote.heading: Get a quote
quote.subtext: Send the problem: what broke, where it fits, and what the part needs to do. Photos are the fastest way to start.
quote.price3: Prototype and iteration work: quoted per project
quote.name: Name
quote.message_placeholder: Example: The plastic clip on my dishwasher rack broke. I still have one intact clip to copy.
quote.success: Request received — we will be in touch soon.
quote.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
